title: Log in and reach the welcome screen
description: Verifies that an existing user can log in with valid credentials and is taken to the welcome screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the welcome screen is displayed

title: Send a message in an existing chat and see it added to the conversation
description: An authenticated member can open a friend chat, send a message, and see the message appear in the thread as a newly sent item.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Switch to the Chats tab
Select a friend from the friends list to open a chat
Fill a unique message (for example, Message {{timestamp}}) into the message input field
Press Enter
Verify the new message appears in the conversation thread

title: Sign up and reach the welcome screen
description: Verifies that a new user can complete registration and is taken to the welcome screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /#signup
Fill Test User into the full name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the signup form
Verify the welcome screen is displayed

title: Dashboard sidebar can switch across all main tabs
description: Verifies an authenticated member can use the sidebar to navigate between all dashboard tabs and each tab updates the main panel content.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to continue from the welcome screen into the dashboard
Switch to the Chats tab
Switch to the Community tab
Switch to the Live News tab
Switch to the Search tab
Switch to the Friend Requests tab
Switch to the Settings tab
Verify the main panel content changes to match the selected tab each time

title: Proceed from welcome into the dashboard default view
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can proceed from the welcome screen into the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Choose to proceed into the app from the welcome screen
Verify the dashboard is displayed

title: Load message history when opening a chat
description: An authenticated member can open a friend chat and see previously loaded message history if it exists or an empty-state if it does not.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Switch to the Chats tab
Select a friend from the friends list to open a chat
Verify the conversation shows message history or an empty-state for no messages

title: Search for users and see matching results
description: An authenticated member can search by a user name and see a list of matching users in the results.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Switch to the Search tab
Fill a common name fragment into the search field
Submit the search
Verify a list of matching users is displayed

title: Friends list shows online/offline indicators
description: An authenticated member can view their friends list and see each friend represented with an online or offline status indicator.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Verify the friends list is displayed with online/offline status indicators

title: Accept an incoming friend request and start chatting with the new friend
description: Verifies a user can accept a pending friend request and the accepted user appears in the friends list ready to chat.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with testuser@nexus.app
Fill in the password field with Test@1234
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Open the friend requests panel
Accept a pending friend request
Verify the accepted user appears in the friends list and can be opened as a chat

title: Update display name from Settings
description: Verifies an authenticated member can change their display name from Settings and sees the updated name reflected in the app UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to continue from the welcome screen into the dashboard
Switch to the Settings tab
Fill a new display name into the display name field
Submit the profile changes
Verify the updated display name is reflected in the app

title: Send a friend request from search results
description: An authenticated member can search for a user and send a friend request, seeing a pending/requested state for that user.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Switch to the Search tab
Fill a common name fragment into the search field
Submit the search
Send a friend request to one user in the results list
Verify the selected user shows a pending/requested state indicating the request was sent

title: Create a community post and see it in the feed with AI insight
description: Verifies a user can create a new post and it appears in the community feed with an AI insight visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with testuser@nexus.app
Fill in the password field with Test@1234
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Switch to the Community tab
Start creating a new post
Fill a unique title into the post title field
Fill post content into the post content field
Fill a community name into the community name field
Submit the post
Verify the new post appears in the community feed with an AI insight displayed

title: Logout ends session and returns to entry screen
description: Verifies a user can log out from Settings and is returned to the unauthenticated entry screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to continue from the welcome screen into the dashboard
Switch to the Settings tab
Click Logout
Verify the user is returned to the unauthenticated entry screen

title: Open a chat from an online friend in the friends list
description: An authenticated member can select an online friend from the friends list and immediately open that chat view.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Switch to the Chats tab
Select an online friend from the friends list
Verify the chat view opens for the selected friend

title: Show typing indicator while the user is composing a message
description: An authenticated member sees a typing indicator state appear while they are typing in an open chat.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Switch to the Chats tab
Select a friend from the friends list to open a chat
Fill a short partial message into the message input field without sending it
Verify a typing indicator is displayed in the chat UI

title: Open a post and add a comment
description: Verifies a user can open a post, submit a comment, and see the comment appear under the post.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with testuser@nexus.app
Fill in the password field with Test@1234
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Switch to the Community tab
Start creating a new post
Fill a unique title into the post title field
Fill post content into the post content field
Fill a community name into the community name field
Submit the post
Open the newly created post
Expand the comment section for the post
Fill a comment into the comment field
Submit the comment
Verify the new comment appears under the post

title: Update profile avatar and switch theme
description: Verifies a user can update their avatar URL and toggle the theme, and the UI reflects both changes without leaving the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to continue from the welcome screen into the dashboard
Switch to the Settings tab
Fill a valid image URL into the avatar URL field
Save the avatar change
Toggle between light and dark mode
Verify the user avatar displayed in the app updates to the new image and the theme changes across the view

title: Message status shows a delivered/sent state after sending
description: An authenticated member can send a message and see a sent/delivered status indicator associated with that message.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Switch to the Chats tab
Select a friend from the friends list to open a chat
Fill a unique message (for example, Status check {{timestamp}}) into the message input field
Press Enter
Verify the new message displays a sent/delivered status indicator

title: Reject an incoming friend request
description: Verifies a user can reject a pending friend request and it is removed from the pending list.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with testuser@nexus.app
Fill in the password field with Test@1234
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Open the friend requests panel
Reject a pending friend request
Verify the rejected request is no longer shown in the pending friend requests list

title: Enter dashboard with Community selected from welcome
description: Verifies that choosing the Community path on the welcome screen opens the dashboard with the Community section active.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Choose to open the Community section from the welcome screen
Verify the Community section is displayed in the dashboard

title: View friend requests badge and clear it by opening the panel
description: Verifies the friend requests notification badge is visible when there are pending requests and clears after viewing them.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with testuser@nexus.app
Fill in the password field with Test@1234
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Verify a friend requests notification badge is displayed when pending requests exist
Open the friend requests panel
Verify the friend requests notification badge is cleared or reduced after viewing the pending list

title: Sidebar shows brand and current user avatar
description: Verifies the sidebar renders the app branding and the current user avatar for an authenticated session.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to continue from the welcome screen into the dashboard
Verify the sidebar displays the app logo/branding and the current user avatar

title: Scroll through chat history without losing the ability to send messages
description: An authenticated member can scroll within a chat history and still send a new message successfully afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Switch to the Chats tab
Select a friend from the friends list to open a chat
Scroll within the conversation history
Fill a unique message (for example, After scroll {{timestamp}}) into the message input field
Press Enter
Verify the new message appears in the conversation thread

title: Like a post in the community feed
description: Verifies a user can like a post and the UI reflects the updated like state for that post.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with testuser@nexus.app
Fill in the password field with Test@1234
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Switch to the Community tab
Start creating a new post
Fill a unique title into the post title field
Fill post content into the post content field
Fill a community name into the community name field
Submit the post
Like the newly created post
Verify the liked state is reflected for the post in the feed

title: Open a chat with an offline friend and view read-only history state
description: An authenticated member can select an offline friend from the friends list and still open the chat to view message history.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Switch to the Chats tab
Select an offline friend from the friends list
Verify the chat view opens and shows message history or an empty-state

title: Browse live news feed and load more articles
description: Verifies a user can browse the live news feed and load more articles to extend the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /#dashboard
Switch to the Live News tab
Scroll through the live news feed
Click load more to fetch older articles
Verify additional news articles are displayed after loading more

title: Friend Requests badge is visible when there are pending requests
description: Verifies the sidebar can surface a friend requests notification badge when pending requests exist and it remains visible when switching tabs.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to continue from the welcome screen into the dashboard
Switch to the Friend Requests tab
Wait for pending friend requests to load
Switch to a different tab
Verify a friend requests notification badge is visible in the sidebar when there are pending requests

title: Accepting a request removes it from pending list
description: Verifies that accepting a friend request updates the pending list so the accepted request no longer appears.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with testuser@nexus.app
Fill in the password field with Test@1234
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Open the friend requests panel
Accept a pending friend request
Verify the accepted request is removed from the pending friend requests list

title: Switching chats shows the newly selected friend conversation
description: An authenticated member can switch between two friend chats and see the conversation context update to the newly selected friend.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Switch to the Chats tab
Select a friend from the friends list to open a chat
Select a different friend from the friends list to open another chat
Verify the chat header and conversation content update to reflect the newly selected friend

title: Create post requires required fields
description: Verifies the post creation form blocks submission when required fields are missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with testuser@nexus.app
Fill in the password field with Test@1234
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Switch to the Community tab
Start creating a new post
Submit the post with one or more required fields left empty
Verify a validation error is shown and the post is not added to the feed

title: Open a news article source URL from the live feed
description: Verifies a user can open a live news item and the app initiates navigation to the article source URL.

steps.description: Navigate to /#dashboard
Switch to the Live News tab
Select a news article from the feed
Open the article source URL
Verify the browser begins navigating to an external article source

title: Rejecting a request removes it from pending list
description: Verifies that rejecting a friend request updates the pending list so the rejected request no longer appears.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with testuser@nexus.app
Fill in the password field with Test@1234
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Open the friend requests panel
Reject a pending friend request
Verify the rejected request is removed from the pending friend requests list

title: Settings validation prevents saving empty display name
description: Verifies the Settings form blocks saving when the display name is cleared and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to continue from the welcome screen into the dashboard
Switch to the Settings tab
Fill an empty value into the display name field
Submit the profile changes
Verify a display name validation error is visible and the changes are not saved

title: Show empty results state when search finds no matches
description: An authenticated member sees an empty-state or no-matches feedback when searching with a term that returns no users.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill Test@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Switch to the Search tab
Fill a highly specific unlikely query (for example, zzznoresults{{timestamp}}) into the search field
Submit the search
Verify an empty results state or no-matches feedback is displayed

title: Handle empty pending friend requests state
description: Verifies the friend requests panel shows an empty state when there are no pending requests.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with testuser@nexus.app
Fill in the password field with Test@1234
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Open the friend requests panel
Verify an empty state is shown when there are no pending friend requests

title: Comment submission requires non-empty content
description: Verifies submitting an empty comment is prevented and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with testuser@nexus.app
Fill in the password field with Test@1234
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Switch to the Community tab
Start creating a new post
Fill a unique title into the post title field
Fill post content into the post content field
Fill a community name into the community name field
Submit the post
Open the newly created post
Expand the comment section for the post
Submit a comment with the comment field empty
Verify a comment validation error is visible and no new comment is added

title: Block login with invalid credentials
description: Verifies that entering an incorrect email or password prevents login and shows an invalid-credentials error toast.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill invalid-user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid-credentials error toast is visible

title: Switch live news categories and see category-specific articles
description: Verifies a user can switch to a news category and the feed updates to show articles for that category.

steps.description: Navigate to /#dashboard
Switch to the Live News tab
Select a news category
Verify the news feed updates to show articles for the selected category

title: Prevent signup with an already-used email
description: Verifies that attempting to register with an existing email is blocked and an email-already-taken error toast is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /#signup
Fill Existing User into the full name field
Fill testuser@nexus.app into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the signup form
Verify an email-already-taken error toast is visible

title: Live news empty state when no articles available
description: Verifies the live news tab shows an empty state when the feed has no articles to display.

steps.description: Navigate to /#dashboard
Switch to the Live News tab
Verify an empty state is displayed if no live news articles are available
